question: Input 3 numbers from the user and determine if a duplicate exists in the numbers. For example, if the user inputs 1,2,1, your program should output "duplicate exists" otherwise it should output "duplicate does not exist".

test_cases.expected: duplicate does not exist (incorrect, should be duplicate exists)

errors: Line 10: Uses AND (&&) instead of OR (||) - only detects when all three numbers are identical, not when any two are duplicates
